Book your full Tamazia audit · £1,500 · free to onboarding clients

Findings belong to you whether you proceed or not. Full report sent to your email.

—

The full audit · £1,500

One document. Every exposure on your digital presence.

Four disciplines read your site the way a regulator, a competitor, and a search engine each read it. Every finding cites the rule or the number behind it, and every finding carries a prioritised fix.

I

Technical

Core Web Vitals benchmarked. Redirect chains, crawl errors, broken links, robots.txt conflicts, and schema gaps. Your Google Business Profile audited: for hospitality, healthcare, and restaurants it is often the single highest-leverage ranking asset on the entire digital presence.

II

Compliance

Existing content scanned against the specific regulatory framework governing your sector. SRA rules for law firms. MHRA and ASA for healthcare. FCA financial promotion standards for financial services. RERA requirements for UAE real estate. If any published content creates regulatory exposure, you will know before a regulator does.

III

Competitive

Keyword gap analysis showing exactly which searches your competitors rank for that you do not. Presented as a revenue opportunity: estimated search volume, conversion probability, and the content investment required to capture it.

IV

AI search

Where your brand currently appears in ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews for your most commercially important queries. And where your competitors appear instead.

Read one before you buy one

This is not a sample template. It is a finished audit.

  • Scored against the register. The presence is graded across the frameworks that govern the sector, not a generic checklist.
  • Every finding cites its source. The regulation, the guideline, or the measurement behind each finding is named on the page.
  • Fixes are ranked, not listed. Each issue carries a prioritised remediation, ordered by regulatory weight and revenue impact.
Read the Monzo audit →

£1,500. Fixed.

Credited in full to your first month if we work together.

You receive the complete findings before any commercial conversation begins. No sales call until you have seen the data and decided you want one. The findings belong to you whether you proceed with Tamazia or not.

Cookies, with your consent.

We use strictly necessary cookies to run this site, and optional analytics cookies to understand how it is used. Nothing optional is set until you choose. Cookie policy · Global Privacy Control detected and honoured.
